name: Broccoli and Cauliflower
recipeIngredient: Equal amounts of broccoli and cauliflower
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the broccoli and cauliflower until almost done.
2. Drain well. In a large frying pan, melt the butter with olive oil and sauté the garlic.
3. Add the broccoli and cauliflower to the pan. Generously cover with breadcrumbs and grated Italian cheese.
4. Heat on medium-high, turning often. The bread crumbs will start to brown and stick slightly.
5. Scrape the bottom of the pan frequently.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Serve hot. It should be somewhat crunchy.
